mapper.sql: pr.id, pr.record_no, pr.user_id, pr.area_id, pr.space_id, pr.car_number, pr.start_time, pr.end_time, pr.parking_duration, pr.unit_price, pr.total_cost, pr.status, pr.pay_status, pr.remark, pr.is_deleted, pr.create_time, pr.update_time
u.username, s.area_name AS areaName, p.space_code AS spaceCode, p.space_name AS spaceName, p.area_size AS areaSize
mapper.select:
SELECT ,
FROM park_record pr LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON pr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN park_area s ON pr.area_id = s.id LEFT JOIN park_space p ON pr.space_id = p.id WHERE pr.id = #{recordId}

SELECT ,
FROM park_record pr LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON pr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN park_area s ON pr.area_id = s.id LEFT JOIN park_space p ON pr.space_id = p.id WHERE 1=1 AND pr.user_id = #{userId} AND pr.space_id = #{spaceId} AND pr.status = #{status} AND pr.create_time >= #{startTime} AND pr.create_time <= #{endTime} AND pr.record_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{recordNo}, '%') AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%') AND p.space_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{spaceCode}, '%') AND pr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY pr.create_time DESC
